parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ 
"📊 *CRM Health Report — " + $json.week + "* — " + $json.run_date + "\n" +
($json.config?.mode === "demo_test"
  ? "_Demo mode: thresholds set to " + $json.config.idle_days + " days for idle/stuck/no-follow-up checks. Production recommendation: idle 14d, stuck 30d, uncontacted 7d._\n"
  : "") +
"\n" +

"*🔴 CRITICAL — Act today*\n" +
"→ " + $json.critical.idle_deals.count + " idle deals ($" + $json.critical.idle_deals.total_value.toLocaleString() + " at risk)\n" +
"→ " + $json.critical.overdue_deals.count + " deals past close date ($" + $json.critical.overdue_deals.total_value.toLocaleString() + ")\n" +
"→ " + $json.critical.uncontacted_leads.count + " new leads with no logged follow-up\n\n" +

"*🟡 WARNINGS*\n" +
"→ " + $json.warnings.stuck_deals.count + " deals stuck 30+ days\n" +
"→ " + $json.warnings.missing_data.contacts_no_reachable_info + " contacts missing contact info\n" +
"→ " + $json.warnings.missing_data.deals_no_owner + " deals with no owner\n" +
"→ CRM data quality score: " + $json.summary.data_quality_score + "/100\n\n" +

"*🎯 FORECAST*\n" +
"→ Monthly target: $" + $json.forecast.monthly_target.toLocaleString() + "\n" +
"→ Weighted pipeline: $" + $json.forecast.weighted_pipeline.toLocaleString() + "\n" +
"→ Gap: $" + $json.forecast.gap.toLocaleString() +
" (" + Math.round(($json.forecast.gap / $json.forecast.monthly_target) * 100) + "%) " +
($json.forecast.on_track ? "✅ On track" : "❌ Behind target") + "\n" +
"→ Forecast confidence: " + $json.forecast.confidence + "\n\n" +

"*📉 PIPELINE*\n" +
"→ Total: $" + $json.summary.total_pipeline_value.toLocaleString() + " " + 
($json.summary.pipeline_change_pct >= 0 ? "▲" : "▼") + " " + 
Math.abs($json.summary.pipeline_change_pct) + "% vs last week\n" +
"→ At risk: $" + $json.summary.at_risk_value.toLocaleString() + 
" (" + $json.summary.at_risk_percentage + "%)\n\n" +

"*🔥 TOP RISK DEALS*\n" +
($json.top_risk_deals && $json.top_risk_deals.length > 0
  ? $json.top_risk_deals.map((d, i) =>
      "→ " + (i + 1) + ". " + d.name +
      " — $" + (d.amount || 0).toLocaleString() +
      " — Owner: " + d.owner +
      (d.days_overdue !== undefined ? " — Overdue: " + d.days_overdue + "d" : "") +
      (d.days_idle !== undefined ? " — Idle: " + d.days_idle + "d" : "") +
      (d.days_in_stage !== undefined ? " — Stage age: " + d.days_in_stage + "d" : "")
    ).join("\n")
  : "→ No high-risk deals detected") +
"\n\n" +

"*🏆 WIN/LOSS THIS MONTH*\n" +
"→ Won: " + $json.win_loss.closed_won_count + " deals ($" + $json.win_loss.won_value.toLocaleString() + ")\n" +
"→ Lost: " + $json.win_loss.closed_lost_count + " deals ($" + $json.win_loss.lost_value.toLocaleString() + ")\n" +
"→ Win rate: " + $json.win_loss.win_rate + "% based on " + 
($json.win_loss.closed_deal_count ?? ($json.win_loss.closed_won_count + $json.win_loss.closed_lost_count)) + 
" closed deals\n\n" +

"*👤 REP PERFORMANCE*\n" +
($json.rep_performance && $json.rep_performance.length > 0
  ? $json.rep_performance.map(r =>
      "→ " + r.name +
      " — Follow-up risk: " + (r.follow_up_risk || (r.score <= 4 ? "High" : r.score <= 7 ? "Medium" : "Low")) +
      " — Idle: " + r.idle +
      " Overdue: " + r.overdue +
      " Uncontacted: " + r.uncontacted
    ).join("\n")
  : "→ No rep data available") +

"\n\n*🧭 PRIORITY ACTIONS*\n" +
($json.critical.overdue_deals.count > 0
  ? "→ Fix overdue close dates today to protect forecast accuracy\n" : "") +
($json.critical.idle_deals.count > 0
  ? "→ Review idle deals and assign next steps\n" : "") +
($json.critical.uncontacted_leads.count > 0
  ? "→ Contact unworked leads within 24 hours\n" : "") +
($json.warnings.missing_data.deals_no_owner > 0
  ? "→ Assign owners to unowned deals immediately\n" : "") +
($json.warnings.missing_data.deals_no_close_date > 0
  ? "→ Add missing close dates to improve forecast reliability\n" : "") +
($json.warnings.missing_data.contacts_no_reachable_info > 0
  ? "→ Complete missing contact info before next campaign\n" : "") +
($json.forecast.on_track ? "" : "→ Review pipeline gap against monthly target\n")
}}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.1-8b-instant",
  "temperature": 0.2,
  "max_tokens": 400,
  "messages": [
    {
  "role": "system",
  "content": "You are a senior Revenue Operations analyst. You interpret weekly CRM health metrics for a sales manager.\n\nRules:\n- Do not blame individual reps by name.\n- Do not mention rep scores directly.\n- Focus on process risks, pipeline risk, and CRM hygiene.\n- Prioritize open-pipeline issues over already-lost deals.\n- If thresholds are in demo mode, mention that results are inflated for testing.\n- Say \"no logged activity in CRM\" instead of \"no activity\".\n- Be concise: maximum 4 sentences.\n- Output plain text only."
},
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Week: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.week + 
      ". Open deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.summary.total_open_deals + 
      ". Pipeline: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.summary.total_pipeline_value + 
      ". Weighted pipeline: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.summary.weighted_pipeline + 
      ". Monthly target: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.summary.monthly_target + 
      ". Forecast gap: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.summary.forecast_gap + 
      ". On track: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.forecast.on_track + 
      ". Idle deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.idle_deals.count + 
      " worth $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.idle_deals.total_value + 
      ". Overdue deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.overdue_deals.count + 
      ". Uncontacted leads: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.uncontacted_leads.count + 
      ". Stuck deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.warnings.stuck_deals.count + 
      ". Missing contact info: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.warnings.missing_data.contacts_no_reachable_info + 
      ". Deals no owner: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.warnings.missing_data.deals_no_owner + 
      ". Won this month: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.closed_won_count + 
      " ($" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.won_value + ")" +
      ". Lost this month: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.closed_lost_count + 
      " ($" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.lost_value + ")" +
      ". Win rate: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.win_rate + "%" +
      ". Rep scores: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.rep_performance.map(r => r.name + " " + r.score + "/10").join(", ") +
      ". Write a 4 sentence executive summary. Start with the biggest business risk. Explain the most actionable CRM issue from the open pipeline. Do not blame individual reps by name and do not mention rep scores. Recommend the first manager action this week. If demo thresholds are set to 0, say the alert volume is intentionally inflated for testing."
    }
  ]
} }}

parameters.subject: ={{ "CRM Health Report — " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.week + " — " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.run_date }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

📊 CRM Health Report — " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.week + "

" + "

" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.run_date + "

" + "

🔴 Critical — Act Today

    " + "
  • Idle deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.idle_deals.count + " ($" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.idle_deals.total_value.toLocaleString() + " at risk)
    • " + "
  • Overdue deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.overdue_deals.count + " ($" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.overdue_deals.total_value.toLocaleString() + ")
    • " + "
  • Leads with no logged follow-up: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.critical.uncontacted_leads.count + "
" + "

🟡 Warnings

    " + "
  • Stuck deals: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.warnings.stuck_deals.count + "
    • " + "
  • Missing contact info: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.warnings.missing_data.contacts_no_reachable_info + "
    • " + "
  • Deals no owner: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.warnings.missing_data.deals_no_owner + "
" + "

🎯 Forecast

    " + "
  • Monthly target: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.forecast.monthly_target.toLocaleString() + "
    • " + "
  • Weighted pipeline: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.forecast.weighted_pipeline.toLocaleString() + "
    • " + "
  • Gap: $" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.forecast.gap.toLocaleString() + " " + ($('Run Health Checks').first().json.forecast.on_track ? "✅ On track" : "❌ Behind target") + "
" + "

🏆 Win/Loss This Month

    " + "
  • Won: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.closed_won_count + " deals ($" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.won_value.toLocaleString() + ")
    • " + "
  • Lost: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.closed_lost_count + " deals ($" + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.lost_value.toLocaleString() + ")
    • " + "
  • Win rate: " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.win_loss.win_rate + "%
" + "

👤 Rep Performance

    " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.rep_performance.map(r => "
  • " + r.name + " — Follow-up risk: " + (r.score <= 4 ? "High" : r.score <= 7 ? "Medium" : "Low") + " — Idle: " + r.idle + " | Overdue: " + r.overdue + " | Uncontacted: " + r.uncontacted + "
    • ").join("") + "
" + "

🤖 AI Summary

" + "

" + $json.choices[0].message.content + "

" + "

Generated automatically by CRM Health Monitor — n8n | " + $('Run Health Checks').first().json.run_date + "

" }}
